title: Comparative epigenomics in distantly related teleost species identifies conserved cis-regulatory nodes active during the vertebrate phylotypic period.
author: Tena JJ Gonzalez-Aguilera C Fernandez-Minan A Vazquez-Marin J Parra-Acero H Cross JW Rigby PW Carvajal JJ Wittbrodt J Gomez-Skarmeta JL Martinez-Morales JR
content: S-EPMC4079964 PMC4079964 Comparative epigenomics in distantly related teleost species identifies conserved cis-regulatory nodes active during the vertebrate phylotypic period.
